result:
This is confirmed to be expected/gitignored (the harness pattern noted in memory), so no commit is needed — the source tree itself now reflects the fixes.

## Summary

The root cause: **Lumina pivoted products** (from an email-cleanup tool called "InboxZap" to an AI meeting assistant called "Lumina") but the pivot was never finished in the code or content:

**What I found & fixed:**
1. **Brand mismatch** — root `<title>`/meta description/OG tags still said "InboxZap — Clean Your Inbox in Minutes" while every visible page was about Lumina meetings. Fixed to consistent Lumina branding, added `metadataBase`, a title template, and `SoftwareApplication` JSON-LD.
2. **Missing pages** — `/features` and `/pricing` existed live but had *no source files at all* — a rebuild would have 404'd them. Recreated both as proper SSR pages with metadata.
3. **Broken blog** — the blog was client-rendered, fetching from a non-existent `/api/posts` (permanent "Loading posts…" spinner, zero content visible to crawlers pre-JS, no per-post pages in source, not in the sitemap). Rebuilt it as server-rendered with real per-post pages, canonical URLs, and `Article` JSON-LD.
4. **Dead content weighing down the domain** — GSC showed all 12 existing blog posts are 100% about the old email-cleanup product (~13k impressions, position 40–60, ~0% CTR) — topically orphaned from the rest of the now-pivoted site. 301-redirected them to `/blog` to consolidate equity rather than leave 404s or off-brand content diluting the domain's topical relevance.
5. **Content gap** — zero content existed for Lumina's actual keyword space. Published 4 new posts targeting real buyer/informational intent (AI meeting notes, meeting transcription tool comparisons, action-item workflows, meeting minutes format).
6. **Dead FAQ redirect** — `/faq` 301'd to `/#faq`, but no FAQ section existed on the homepage. Built a real FAQ section with `FAQPage` JSON-LD for rich-result eligibility.
7. **Sitemap** — updated from a stubbed TODO to programmatically include all blog posts.
8. Added internal links (home → features/pricing/blog) that previously only existed in nav.

Verified via full production build + local server: build succeeds, typecheck is clean, all redirects/canonicals/JSON-LD/sitemap render correctly.

**Open item worth flagging:** `/img/og-lumina.png` is referenced everywhere (including in the pre-existing live pages) but doesn't exist as a file — OG previews are currently broken sitewide. That's a design asset, not something I fabricated a placeholder for.

tool_input.command:
grep -A3 "faq redirect" -m1 /Users/aleclindsay/.claude/projects/-Users-aleclindsay-seo-skill-bench-results-2026-07-07T21-24-11-lhitches-claude-seo-skills-pivot-saas-run-2-workspace/c8bc8965-d3ed-43e6-b941-e7e25f43ca95/tool-results/bcpsyiiva.txt
echo "---"
sed -n '/=== faq redirect/,/=== new blog post/p' /Users/aleclindsay/.claude/projects/-Users-aleclindsay-seo-skill-bench-results-2026-07-07T21-24-11-lhitches-claude-seo-skills-pivot-saas-run-2-workspace/c8bc8965-d3ed-43e6-b941-e7e25f43ca95/tool-results/bcpsyiiva.txt
echo "---sitemap---"
sed -n '/=== sitemap/,/=== features/p' /Users/aleclindsay/.claude/projects/-Users-aleclindsay-seo-skill-bench-results-2026-07-07T21-24-11-lhitches-claude-seo-skills-pivot-saas-run-2-workspace/c8bc8965-d3ed-43e6-b941-e7e25f43ca95/tool-results/bcpsyiiva.txt
echo "---features---"
tail -5 /Users/aleclindsay/.claude/projects/-Users-aleclindsay-seo-skill-bench-results-2026-07-07T21-24-11-lhitches-claude-seo-skills-pivot-saas-run-2-workspace/c8bc8965-d3ed-43e6-b941-e7e25f43ca95/tool-results/bcpsyiiva.txt
tool_input.description: Inspect the saved curl outputs for redirects and sitemap
